All three P2 Graph View enhancement features have been **fully implemented and verified**:

1. ✅ **Link Strength Visualization** - Variable edge thickness based on connection type
2. ✅ **Search & Highlight** - Advanced search with node highlighting and filtering
3. ✅ **Orphan Detection & Management** - Toggle, panel, and intelligent suggestions

## Implementation Summary

### Part 1: Link Strength Visualization ✅

**Files Created:**
- `src/utils/graphLinkStrength.ts` - Link strength calculation and visual mapping
- `src/components/Graph/LinkStrengthLegend.tsx` - Visual legend component

**Implementation Details:**
- **Strength Levels:** Three levels (strong/medium/weak) based on connection type
  - **Strong (3px):** Bidirectional wiki links (A↔B)
  - **Medium (2px):** Single-direction wiki links (A→B)
  - **Weak (1px, dashed):** Tag-based connections
- **Visual Encoding:**
  - Variable stroke width (1-3px)
  - Variable opacity (0.4-0.8)
  - Dashed lines for tag-based connections
- **Toggle Control:** "Show link strength" checkbox (enabled by default)
- **Legend:** Real-time visual guide showing all three strength levels

### Part 2: Search & Highlight ✅

**Files Created:**
- `src/utils/graphSearch.ts` - Search logic with fuzzy matching and filtering
- `src/components/Graph/GraphSearch.tsx` - Advanced search UI component

**Implementation Details:**
- **Search Capabilities:**
  - Text query with fuzzy matching (case-insensitive)
  - Tag filtering (multi-select)
  - Node type filtering (notes/tags/both)
  - Connected nodes filtering
- **Visual Highlighting:**
  - Matching nodes: 1.2x scale, 3px stroke, full opacity
  - Non-matching nodes: 0.3 opacity when search active
  - Search result count display
- **Advanced Filters:**
  - Collapsible filter panel
  - Active filter chips with individual removal
  - "Clear All" button for quick reset
- **Debounced Input:** 300ms delay to avoid excessive re-renders

### Part 3: Orphan Detection & Management ✅

**Files Created:**
- `src/utils/graphOrphanDetection.ts` - Orphan detection and suggestion engine
- `src/components/Graph/OrphanPanel.tsx` - Sidebar panel for orphan management

**Implementation Details:**
- **Detection:** Automatic identification of notes with no connections
- **Orphan Count Badge:** Real-time display (e.g., "Orphans (0)")
- **Toggle Control:** "Hide orphans" checkbox to filter orphans from graph
- **Orphan Panel:**
  - Sidebar with expandable orphan list
  - Intelligent connection suggestions based on:
    - Similar title (Levenshtein distance >50%)
    - Same folder
    - Recent edits (within 7 days)
    - Similar content (>20% common words)
    - Common tags in folder
  - Actions: Create link, Add tag, Focus on orphan
  - Confidence scores (0-1) for each suggestion
